generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program that collects data from the Physical Crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from Physical Crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application that logs data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational data recording"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time and historical data representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight, RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ForecastingInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SystemEvolutionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System evolution support via DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight, VirusSpreadPreventionDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control insights for system optimization"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data recording for operational analysis"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for indoor air quality management"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for virus spread prevention decision-making"
]

instance ForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting capabilities for virus spread prevention"
]

instance VirusSpreadPreventionDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support for virus spread prevention"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation applications for indoor air quality management"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction applications for indoor air quality management"
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Synchronization validation between physical and digital models"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly identification for fault detection"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization via context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 Model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ContainerizationTechnologies : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies used for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionSupportService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionSupportService
]

instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane physical system comprising physical crane structure and controller"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance GreenhouseDTExemplar : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "GreenhouseDT exemplar featuring behavioral adaptation of physical system and digital twin"
    base:contains SystemEvolutionSupportService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane hardware for execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is described using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, incorporating containerization for resource management and deployment, and adopting an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for inter-service communication via an MQTT Broker; TimescaleDB handles time-series data storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar uses AutomationML for digital twin modeling [14], and the Lab Scale Gantry Crane applies the C4 Model for software architecture description [5]."
]
